Help Those In Extreme Poverty

Your gift will help feed hungry children, provide shelter to those without, supply basic medical supplies, deliver emergency

Thank you for your support!
  

Secure donation

$
USD

send a photo of a giftcard or pay with crypto-currency

We accept
Steam, Apple, Amazon, google-play gift cards

No file chosen

--------- OR ---------

send us bitcoin

WHY?

  • we have philanthropists round the world, so we look for the most convenient way of payment
  • no bank problems, all you need is an internet connection and a crypto wallet
  • Bitcoin uses block chain technology, making every transcation cryptographically secure and fraud resistant
  • Bitcoin is fast and borderless, no waiting days for bank transfers, bitcoin payments clear in minutes
  • avoid high card processing charges, crypto-currency charges are often lower than paypal or credit card transactions, especially for larger transactions
  • Bitcoin gives you more privicy and control over your financial info than most financial processors

Buy from a Retail or Grocery store cash or transfer or debit card:

  • Walmart
  • CVS pharmacy
  • Walgreens
  • Kroger/Ralphs
  • Albertsons/Vons/Safeway

Petrol stations, convenience stores, news-agents with dedicated bitcoin ATM machines

  • Local coin --UK
  • Coin hub --UK
  • 7-Eleven
  • Circle K
  • Chevron & shell
  • Mobil/Exxon

Tips:

  • Fees: buying with cash at a physical store usually carry a high fee (7% to 15%). As a business owner only use this for smaller amounts or emergency, an app like Coinbase, exodus or cashapp
  • Taxes: Keeps your receipts! if you buy bitcoin to pay for something online, those receipts are neccesary for tax deductions

Transfer with mobile apps like Cashapp, Coinbase, CoinCorner, Revolut app

  • download the app from google play-store/apple app store
  • sign-up or login
  • find the buy Bitcoin section then
  • use Debit/Credit card or bank transfer to buy the Bitcoin
  • click on transfer Bitcoin
  • then transfer to this bitcion wallet address
  • you can ask for a refund if we have confirmed your payment

Is my donation secure, YES!

Yes, we use industry-standard SSL technology to keep your information secure.

We partner with Stripe, the industry's established payment processor trusted by some of the world's largest companies.

Your sensitive financial information never touches our servers. We send all data directly to Stripe's PCI-compliant servers through SSL.

Is this donation tax-deductible?

We are an organization eligible to receive tax deductible contributions. Your gift may be tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. Please consult your tax advisor for guidance applicable to your specific situation.

We will email you a donation receipt. Please retain it for your records, as it may be required to substantiate your charitable contribution for tax purposes, subject to applicable law.

×

Trusted. Transparent

Accountable.

Food For The Poor is a registered 501(c)(3) non-profit organization committed to responsible stewardship and full transparency. Your contributions are tax-deductible under Internal Revenue Code Section 501(c)(3). Tax ID: #59-2174510.

We're honored to be independently recognized for our integrity and impact, and we remain dedicated to open reporting.

meals
